share.title: My Brawl Stars Power Score
share.text: My Brawl Stars account has a power equivalent to {gems} Gems! I have {prestige} Brawlers at Prestige. Can you beat me?
share.flexSubtitle: Download your Player Card for TikTok or Instagram Reels!

club.title: CLUB
club.noClubDescription: This player is not currently a member of any club. Join a club to compete with friends!
club.clickToCompare: Click a member to compare your account with theirs
club.timeTooltip:
Estimated time based on current Win Rate ({winRate}%).

Players with a higher win rate required fewer real hours.

compare.subtitle: Compare your account with another player

cosmetics.title: COSMETICS
cosmetics.subtitle: Calculate the value of your skins
cosmetics.instructions: Check your skin inventory in-game and enter how many you own per rarity. The value is calculated automatically.

premium.title: BrawlVision Premium
premium.subtitle: Take your game to the next level
premium.ageNotice: You must be 16+ or have parental consent.
premium.cancelledNotice: Subscription cancelled, active until end of period.
premium.modalSubtitle: Choose your plan and start winning more
premium.modalFeature1: Complete history of all your battles
premium.modalFeature2: Personal matchups: know who you beat and who counters you
premium.modalFeature3: "Play Now" recommendations based on YOUR data
premium.emailBody: Your Premium account is active. You now have access to advanced analytics, unlimited history, and all pro tools.
premium.emailFooter: If you have any questions, just reply to this email. See you in the arena!

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.thirdPartyBody: Teammate and opponent data comes from Supercell public API for aggregate analytics.
privacy.retentionBody: Battles are preserved indefinitely, even after cancellation.
privacy.gdprBody: Request data export or deletion at privacy@brawlvision.com.
privacy.cookiesBody: We use localStorage and Supabase Auth cookies. AdSense sets ad cookies for free users.
privacy.disclaimerBody: BrawlVision is not affiliated with Supercell Oy. Brawl Stars is a trademark of Supercell.

advancedAnalytics.brawlerMapEmptyHint: Play 3+ games with the same brawler on a map.
advancedAnalytics.matchupsEmptyHint: Play 3+ games against the same brawler.
advancedAnalytics.teamEmptyHint: Play more with same teammates or combos.
advancedAnalytics.tiltAlertDesc: Your WR drops from {normal}% to {tilt}% after 3+ losses. Consider taking breaks.
advancedAnalytics.counterEmpty: Not enough data against those opponents. Play more!
advancedAnalytics.tipBrawlerMap: Your win rate per brawler on each map. Green = strong (60%+), gold = average, red = weak. Only 3+ games combos.
advancedAnalytics.tipMatchups: Your personal win rate against enemy brawlers. Based on YOUR data, not global meta.
advancedAnalytics.tipTeam: Brawler Combos shows best pairs. Teammates shows WR with specific players. Ranked by statistical confidence.
advancedAnalytics.tipTrends: Daily WR trend and trophy progression. Dashed line at 50% is break-even.
advancedAnalytics.tipTilt: Tilt = 3+ consecutive losses in a session. Compares normal WR vs tilted WR.
advancedAnalytics.tipMastery: How your cumulative WR evolves per brawler. Upward curve = mastering it.
advancedAnalytics.tipTimeOfDay: Your WR by hour of day (UTC). Highlighted bar is current hour.
advancedAnalytics.tipStarPlayer: How often you were match MVP. Higher = carrying your team.
advancedAnalytics.enterEnemiesHint: Enter enemy brawlers above and hit Find Counters
advancedAnalytics.loginRequired: Sign in with Google to access your analytics
advancedAnalytics.tipClutch: Compares your WR when Star Player vs not. Higher delta = you carry more.
advancedAnalytics.tipWarmUp: Compares first 2 games per session (warm-up) vs rest. Positive delta = you improve after warming up.
advancedAnalytics.tipPowerLevel: Your win rate at each brawler power level. Higher levels should perform better.
advancedAnalytics.tipComfort: Combines play frequency, WR confidence, and consistency. Higher = more reliable pick.
advancedAnalytics.tipWeekly: Your win rate by day of week. Find your best and worst days.
advancedAnalytics.tipOpponent: How you perform against opponents of different trophy levels relative to yours.
advancedAnalytics.tipCarry: Carry = your team avg trophies much lower than opponents. Shows if you win unfavorable matchups.
advancedAnalytics.tipSessionEff: Performance by session length. Find your optimal session duration.
advancedAnalytics.tipRecovery: How quickly you bounce back after tilt (3+ losses). Success = reaching positive WR again.
advancedAnalytics.tipGadget: Compares your win rate with and without gadgets/star powers equipped.
advancedAnalytics.clutchBetterStar: You perform {delta}% better as Star Player
advancedAnalytics.clutchNoBoost: Star Player doesn't boost your WR ({delta}%)
advancedAnalytics.warmUpDropOff: You start strong but drop {delta}% after warm-up
advancedAnalytics.carryMaintain: You maintain {wr}% WR even when carrying!
